label: .NET Developer / Database Administrator at NWMLS
headline: .NET Developer & Database Administrator — C#, SQL Server, T-SQL, ASP.NET, MLS Systems

solid-earth.title: .NET Developer / Architect (MLS & RETS)
description: Architected and maintained RETS client/server software on Oracle and C#, achieving high-speed protocol compliance for real estate integrations.
Performed intensive performance tuning of databases, stored procedures, and data handling to ensure sub-second response times for broker integrations.
Built configurable ASP.NET MLS frontends and statistics modules, surfacing deep market analytics and metrics for real estate administrators.
Coordinated with MLS stakeholders to manage deployment windows and maintain high data freshness and system uptime.

iadvantage.title: Lead Developer / Database Administrator (Azure DevOps)
description: Led full-stack delivery of lab systems using ASP.NET WebForms/MVC/WebAPI and complex relational database designs in SQL Server and Oracle.
Guided database migration strategies and Azure DevOps release engineering for production deployments across multiple environments.
Developed and optimized stored procedures, views, and complex T-SQL/PL-SQL queries to handle user-defined data models and custom reporting.
Implemented rigorous audit logging and data lineage features to maintain system integrity and security compliance.

storable.title: Software Engineer II
description: Engineered .NET Core services and background jobs using Hangfire and Entity Framework over SQL Server and PostgreSQL.
Automated data synchronization across desktop WinForms and web applications to maintain eligibility and billing integrity.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to triage production database issues and refactor high-risk areas for improved stability.
Established unit-testing patterns for database-interacting code and documented deployment procedures for the engineering team.
Delivered full-stack .NET and SQL Server applications for inventory and operations workflows, including custom database schema design.
Created service endpoints and mobile C# applications to capture and sync field data with backend SQL Server systems.
Optimized web backend tracking applications for logistics shipments using ASP.NET and SQL Server.
